sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53679" key="katabafh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατα-βᾰφής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n53679.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">soaked</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δρώπακι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:1:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.30</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
